ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was released */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the application */,
  "app_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the application icon */,
  "app_category" TEXT /* Category or type of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer or development team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the developer */,
  "developer_website" TEXT /* URL to the developer's website */,
  "developer_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the developer */,
  "developer_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application this version belongs to */,
  "miui_version" TEXT /* MIUI version number */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Minimum compatible Android version */,
  "file_size" REAL /* File size of the version in MB */,
  "update_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was updated */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times this version has been downloaded */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes in this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Full changelog for this version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for this version */,
  "min_sdk_version" TEXT /* Minimum Android SDK version required */,
  "target_sdk_version" TEXT /* Target Android SDK version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is active */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this version is a rollback */,
  "rollback_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version this version rolls back to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the version */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the download event */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used for the download */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who downloaded the version */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, tester) */,
  "user_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version this entry corresponds to */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "rollback_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rollback, if applicable */,
  "rollback_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version this history entry rolls back to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version this entry corresponds to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., downloads, active_users) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date related to the metric value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the metric was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_storage" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version this file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in storage */,
  "file_size_mb" REAL /* Size of the file in megabytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_storage_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Full changelog for the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_log_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_log_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)
